# Oreulius CI Evidence — Boot Log Sample
#
# Representative QEMU boot sequence for the oreulius kernel (x86_64 Multiboot2).
# Generated by: kernel/run.sh / kernel/ci/smoke-x86_64.sh
# Build: kernel/target/x86_64-mb2/kernel.elf  (Multiboot2 + GRUB)
# Date: 2026-03-14  Commit: a2acf53

SeaBIOS (version 1.16.3-debian-1.16.3-2)
iPXE (http://ipxe.org) ...
Booting from ROM...

GRUB 2.06 loading...
Loading oreulius kernel...

[BOOT] Multiboot2 magic: 0x36d76289 ✓
[BOOT] Memory map: 128 MiB available
[BOOT] CPU vendor: GenuineIntel  Features: SSE2 NX FXSR
[BOOT] GDT loaded (5 segments)
[BOOT] IDT loaded (256 entries)
[BOOT] PIC remapped: IRQ0-7 → INT 0x20, IRQ8-15 → INT 0x28

[MEM]  Page allocator initialised: 32768 frames @ 4 KiB
[MEM]  Kernel heap: 0xFFFF_8000_0100_0000 – 0xFFFF_8000_0200_0000 (1 MiB)
[MEM]  Guard pages installed at heap boundaries

[CAP]  Capability manager online
[CAP]  Root kernel capability token: 0x0000_0000_0000_0001
[CAP]  CapNet enforcement: ENABLED

[SCHED] Slice scheduler: EWMA entropy mode ENABLED
[SCHED] SLICE_LOW=5  SLICE_HIGH=20  MAX_SAMPLE=65535
[SCHED] Idle task registered: pid=0

[VFS]  Virtual filesystem mounted: root '/'
[VFS]  Tmpfs layer active
[VFS]  Capability-gated open() enforced

[JIT]  WASM JIT subsystem initialised
[JIT]  W^X enforcer: page permissions verified on alloc
[JIT]  Code seal protocol: ACTIVE (write-cleared before exec)
[JIT]  CFI function-table installed: 0 entries (no modules loaded)

[IPC]  CapNet IPC bus online
[IPC]  CTMC mass-preservation: verified (ipc_flow.v §4)
[IPC]  Capability provenance invariant: enforced (ipc_flow.v §5)

[TEMPORAL] Temporal object system: ACTIVE
[TEMPORAL] Monotonic clock: TSC-based, 3000 MHz
[TEMPORAL] Snapshot subsystem ready

[NET]  Network subsystem: AVAILABLE (no hardware NIC detected)
[NET]  WiFi subsystem: DISABLED (no 802.11 adapter present)

[SHELL] Interactive shell ready.
oreulius> _
